BetaManagedAgentsCustomToolParams { description, input\_schema, name, type } о‚љ

A custom tool that is executed by the API client rather than the agent. When the agent calls this tool, an `agent.custom_tool_use` event is emitted and the session goes idle, waiting for the client to provide the result via a `user.custom_tool_result` event.

description: stringо‚љ

Description of what the tool does, shown to the agent to help it decide when to use the tool. 1-1024 characters.

оЂЄ

input\_schema: [BetaManagedAgentsCustomToolInputSchema](api/beta.md) { type, properties, required } о‚љ

JSON Schema for custom tool input parameters.

type: "object"о‚љ

properties?: Record<string, unknown> | nullо‚љ

required?: Array<string> | nullо‚љ

name: stringо‚љ

Unique name for the tool. 1-128 characters; letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens.

type: "custom"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionStats { active\_seconds, duration\_seconds } о‚љ

Timing statistics for a session.

active\_seconds?: numberо‚љ

Cumulative time in seconds the session spent in running status. Excludes idle time.

duration\_seconds?: numberо‚љ

Elapsed time since session creation in seconds. For terminated sessions, frozen at the final update.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionUpdatedEvent { id, processed\_at, type, 3 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an UpdateSession request changed at least one field. Carries only the fields that changed; absent fields were not part of the update. The new configuration applies from the next turn.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "session.updated"о‚љ

id: [BetaManagedAgentsModel](api/beta.md)о‚љ

The model that will power your agent.

See [models](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/models-overview) for additional details and options.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

"claude-fable-5" | "claude-opus-4-8" | "claude-opus-4-7" | 8 moreо‚љ

"claude-fable-5"о‚љ

Next generation of intelligence for the hardest knowledge work and coding problems

"claude-opus-4-8"о‚љ

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

"claude-opus-4-7"о‚љ

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

"claude-opus-4-6"о‚љ

Most intelligent model for building agents and coding

"claude-sonnet-4-6"о‚љ

Best combination of speed and intelligence

"claude-haiku-4-5"о‚љ

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"о‚љ

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

"claude-opus-4-5"о‚љ

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

"claude-opus-4-5-20251101"о‚љ

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

"claude-sonnet-4-5"о‚љ

High-performance model for agents and coding

"claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929"о‚љ

High-performance model for agents and coding

(string & {})о‚љ

"standard"о‚љ

"fast"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionUsage { cache\_creation, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, output\_tokens } о‚љ

Cumulative token usage for a session across all turns.

оЂЄ

cache\_creation?: [BetaManagedAgentsCacheCreationUsage](api/beta.md) { ephemeral\_1h\_input\_tokens, ephemeral\_5m\_input\_tokens } о‚љ

Prompt-cache creation token usage broken down by cache lifetime.

ephemeral\_1h\_input\_tokens?: numberо‚љ

Tokens used to create 1-hour ephemeral cache entries.

ephemeral\_5m\_input\_tokens?: numberо‚љ

Tokens used to create 5-minute ephemeral cache entries.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens?: numberо‚љ

Total tokens read from prompt cache.

input\_tokens?: numberо‚љ

Total input tokens consumed across all turns.

output\_tokens?: numberо‚љ

Total output tokens generated across all turns.

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolResultEvent { id, tool\_use\_id, type, 4 more } о‚љ

Event sent by the client providing the result of an agent-toolset tool execution. Only valid on `self_hosted` environments, where sandbox-routed tools are executed by the client rather than the server.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_result"о‚љ

#### BetaSessionsEvents

##### [List Events](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md)

client.beta.sessions.events.list(stringsessionID, EventListParams { created\_at[gt], created\_at[gte], created\_at[lt], 6 more } params?, RequestOptionsoptions?): PageCursor<[BetaManagedAgentsSessionEvent](api/beta.md)>

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/events

##### [Send Events](api/beta/sessions/events/send.md)

client.beta.sessions.events.send(stringsessionID, EventSendParams { events, betas } params, RequestOptionsoptions?): [BetaManagedAgentsSendSessionEvents](api/beta.md) { data }

POST/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/events

##### [Stream Events](api/beta/sessions/events/stream.md)

client.beta.sessions.events.stream(stringsessionID, EventStreamParams { betas } params?, RequestOptionsoptions?): [BetaManagedAgentsStreamSessionEvents](api/beta.md) | Stream<[BetaManagedAgentsStreamSessionEvents](api/beta.md)>

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent { id, input, name, 3 more } о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

input: Record<string, unknown>о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: stringо‚љ

Name of the custom tool being called.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.custom\_tool\_use"о‚љ

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

оЂЄ

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

"allow"о‚љ

"ask"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEvent { id, input, name, 4 more } о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent invokes a built-in agent tool.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

input: Record<string, unknown>о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: stringо‚љ

Name of the agent tool being used.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.tool\_use"о‚љ

оЂЄ

evaluated\_permission?: "allow" | "ask" | "deny"о‚љ

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

One of the following:

"allow"о‚љ

"ask"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its permission request on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.tool_confirmation` event to route the approval back.

BetaManagedAgentsBillingError { message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

The caller's organization or workspace cannot make model requests вЂ” out of credits or spend limit reached. Retrying with the same credentials will not succeed; the caller must resolve the billing state.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "billing\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsCredentialHostUnreachableError { credential\_id, message, retry\_status, 2 more } о‚љ

An `environment_variable` credential's `auth.networking.allowed_hosts` includes a host the environment's network policy does not permit.

credential\_id: stringо‚љ

ID of the affected credential.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "credential\_host\_unreachable\_error"о‚љ

vault\_id: stringо‚љ

ID of the vault containing the affected credential.

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEventParams { type, session\_thread\_id } о‚љ

Parameters for sending an interrupt to pause the agent.

type: "user.interrupt"о‚љ

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventParams { result, tool\_use\_id, type, deny\_message } о‚љ

result: "allow" | "deny"о‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"о‚љ

deny\_message?: string | nullо‚љ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParams { content, type } о‚љ

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

оЂЄ

content: Array<[BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md) { text, type } >о‚љ

System content blocks to append. Text-only.

text: stringо‚љ

The text content.

type: "text"о‚љ

type: "system.message"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsMCPAuthenticationFailedError { mcp\_server\_name, message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

Authentication to an MCP server failed.

mcp\_server\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the MCP server that failed authentication.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "mcp\_authentication\_failed\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent { id, type, processed\_at, session\_thread\_id } о‚љ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

type: "user.interrupt"о‚љ

processed\_at?: string | nullо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent { id, result, tool\_use\_id, 4 more } о‚љ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

result: "allow" | "deny"о‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"о‚љ

deny\_message?: string | nullо‚љ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at?: string | nullо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserCustomToolResultEvent { id, custom\_tool\_use\_id, type, 4 more } о‚љ

Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

custom\_tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.custom_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.custom\_tool\_result"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent { id, description, max\_iterations, 4 more } о‚љ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

description: stringо‚љ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: number | nullо‚љ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

оЂЄ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent { id, type, processed\_at, session\_thread\_id } о‚љ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

type: "user.interrupt"о‚љ

processed\_at?: string | nullо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent { id, result, tool\_use\_id, 4 more } о‚љ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

result: "allow" | "deny"о‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"о‚љ

deny\_message?: string | nullо‚љ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at?: string | nullо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserCustomToolResultEvent { id, custom\_tool\_use\_id, type, 4 more } о‚љ

Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

custom\_tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.custom_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.custom\_tool\_result"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent { id, input, name, 3 more } о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

input: Record<string, unknown>о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: stringо‚љ

Name of the custom tool being called.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.custom\_tool\_use"о‚љ

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsAgentMessageEvent { id, content, processed\_at, type } о‚љ

An agent response event in the session conversation.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

content: Array<[BetaManagedAgentsTextBlock](api/beta.md) { text, type } >о‚љ

Array of text blocks comprising the agent response.

text: stringо‚љ

The text content.

type: "text"о‚љ

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.message"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsAgentThinkingEvent { id, processed\_at, type } о‚љ

Indicates the agent is making forward progress via extended thinking. A progress signal, not a content carrier.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.thinking"о‚љ

оЂЄ

input: Record<string, unknown>о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

mcp\_server\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the MCP server providing the tool.

name: stringо‚љ

Name of the MCP tool being used.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оЂЄ

"deny"о‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent { id, error, processed\_at, type } о‚љ

An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

error: [BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsModelOverloadedError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsModelRateLimitedError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  | 5 moreо‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError { message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "unknown\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsModelOverloadedError { message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

The model is currently overloaded. Emitted after automatic retries are exhausted.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "model\_overloaded\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsModelRateLimitedError { message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

The model request was rate-limited.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "model\_rate\_limited\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

stop\_reason: [BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction](api/beta.md) { event\_ids, type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn { type } о‚љ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

type: "end\_turn"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction { event\_ids, type } о‚љ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: Array<string>о‚љ

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: "requires\_action"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted { type } о‚љ

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

type: "retries\_exhausted"о‚љ

type: "session.status\_idle"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionStatusTerminatedEvent { id, processed\_at, type } о‚љ

Indicates the session has terminated, either due to an error or completion.

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "session.status\_terminated"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadCreatedEvent { id, agent\_name, processed\_at, 2 more } о‚љ

Emitted when a subagent is spawned as a new thread. Written to the parent thread's output stream so clients observing the session see child creation.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the callable agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringо‚љ

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

type: "session.thread\_created"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent { id, explanation, iteration, 6 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вЂ” no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: stringо‚љ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: stringо‚љ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вЂ” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"о‚љ

оЂЄ

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

speed?: "standard" | "fast" | nullо‚љ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"о‚љ

"fast"о‚љ

One of the following:

"standard"о‚љ

"fast"о‚љ

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent { id, description, max\_iterations, 4 more } о‚љ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

description: stringо‚љ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: number | nullо‚љ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

Routes this result to a subagent thread. Copy from the `agent.tool_use` event's `session_thread_id`.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusRescheduledEvent { id, agent\_name, processed\_at, 2 more } о‚љ

A session thread hit a transient error and is retrying automatically. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringо‚љ

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that is retrying.

type: "session.thread\_status\_rescheduled"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionUpdatedEvent { id, processed\_at, type, 3 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an UpdateSession request changed at least one field. Carries only the fields that changed; absent fields were not part of the update. The new configuration applies from the next turn.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "session.updated"о‚љ

A mid-conversation system message event. Carries system-role content that is appended to the session as a `role: "system"` turn.

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction { event\_ids, type } о‚љ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: Array<string>о‚љ

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: "requires\_action"о‚љ

оЂЄ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadCreatedEvent { id, agent\_name, processed\_at, 2 more } о‚љ

Emitted when a subagent is spawned as a new thread. Written to the parent thread's output stream so clients observing the session see child creation.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the callable agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusIdleEvent { id, agent\_name, processed\_at, 3 more } о‚љ

A session thread has yielded and is awaiting input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringо‚љ

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that went idle.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn { type } о‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

The id of the corresponding `span.model_request_start` event.

оЂЄ

model\_usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

speed?: "standard" | "fast" | nullо‚љ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"о‚љ

"fast"о‚љ

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.model\_request\_end"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelRequestStartEvent { id, processed\_at, type } о‚љ

Emitted when a model request is initiated by the agent.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.model\_request\_start"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

speed?: "standard" | "fast" | nullо‚љ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"о‚љ

"fast"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent { id, explanation, iteration, 6 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вЂ” no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: stringо‚љ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: stringо‚љ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вЂ” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"о‚љ

оЂЄ

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

speed?: "standard" | "fast" | nullо‚љ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"о‚љ

"fast"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_ongoing"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent { id, type, processed\_at, session\_thread\_id } о‚љ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

type: "user.interrupt"о‚љ

processed\_at?: string | nullо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent { id, result, tool\_use\_id, 4 more } о‚љ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

result: "allow" | "deny"о‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"о‚љ

deny\_message?: string | nullо‚љ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at?: string | nullо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserCustomToolResultEvent { id, custom\_tool\_use\_id, type, 4 more } о‚љ

Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

custom\_tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.custom_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.custom\_tool\_result"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent { id, input, name, 3 more } о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

input: Record<string, unknown>о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: stringо‚љ

Name of the custom tool being called.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.custom\_tool\_use"о‚љ

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

error: [BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsModelOverloadedError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsModelRateLimitedError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  | 5 moreо‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError { message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "unknown\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оЂЄ

stop\_reason: [BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction](api/beta.md) { event\_ids, type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn { type } о‚љ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

type: "end\_turn"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction { event\_ids, type } о‚љ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: Array<string>о‚љ

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: "requires\_action"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted { type } о‚љ

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

type: "retries\_exhausted"о‚љ

type: "session.status\_idle"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionStatusTerminatedEvent { id, processed\_at, type } о‚љ

Indicates the session has terminated, either due to an error or completion.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "session.status\_terminated"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadCreatedEvent { id, agent\_name, processed\_at, 2 more } о‚љ

Emitted when a subagent is spawned as a new thread. Written to the parent thread's output stream so clients observing the session see child creation.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the callable agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringо‚љ

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

type: "session.thread\_created"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent { id, explanation, iteration, 6 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вЂ” no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: stringо‚љ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: stringо‚љ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вЂ” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"о‚љ

оЂЄ

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

speed?: "standard" | "fast" | nullо‚љ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"о‚љ

"fast"о‚љ

оЂЄ

оЂЄ

model\_usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } о‚љ

speed?: "standard" | "fast" | nullо‚љ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"о‚љ

"fast"о‚љ

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.model\_request\_end"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_ongoing"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent { id, description, max\_iterations, 4 more } о‚љ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

description: stringо‚љ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: number | nullо‚љ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

rubric: [BetaManagedAgentsFileRubric](api/beta.md) { file\_id, type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsTextRubric](api/beta.md) { content, type } о‚љ

One of the following:

type: "text"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEvent { id, content, type, processed\_at } о‚љ

A mid-conversation system message event. Carries system-role content that is appended to the session as a `role: "system"` turn.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

content: Array<[BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md) { text, type } >о‚љ

System content blocks. Text-only.

text: stringо‚љ

The text content.

type: "text"о‚љ

type: "system.message"о‚љ

processed\_at?: string | nullо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParams { content, type } о‚љ

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

оЂЄ

content: Array<[BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md) { text, type } >о‚љ

System content blocks to append. Text-only.

text: stringо‚љ

The text content.

type: "text"о‚љ

type: "system.message"о‚љ

Regular text content.

text: stringо‚љ

type: "text"о‚љ

Rubric content provided inline as text.

content: stringо‚љ

Rubric content. Plain text or markdown вЂ” the grader treats it as freeform text.

type: "text"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsTextRubricParams { content, type } о‚љ

Rubric content provided inline as text.

content: stringо‚љ

type: "text"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError { message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "unknown\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent { id, description, max\_iterations, 4 more } о‚љ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

description: stringо‚љ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: number | nullо‚љ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent { id, type, processed\_at, session\_thread\_id } о‚љ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

type: "user.interrupt"о‚љ

processed\_at?: string | nullо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEventParams { type, session\_thread\_id } о‚љ

Parameters for sending an interrupt to pause the agent.

type: "user.interrupt"о‚љ

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent { id, result, tool\_use\_id, 4 more } о‚љ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

result: "allow" | "deny"о‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"о‚љ

deny\_message?: string | nullо‚љ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at?: string | nullо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventParams { result, tool\_use\_id, type, deny\_message } о‚љ

Parameters for confirming or denying a tool execution request.

оЂЄ

result: "allow" | "deny"о‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"о‚љ

deny\_message?: string | nullо‚љ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolResultEventParams { tool\_use\_id, type, content, is\_error } о‚љ

Parameters for providing the result of an agent-toolset tool execution. Only valid on `self_hosted` environments, where sandbox-routed tools are executed by the client rather than the server.

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_result"о‚љ

оЂЄ

#### BetaSessionsResources

##### [Add Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/add.md)

client.beta.sessions.resources.add(stringsessionID, ResourceAddParams { file\_id, type, mount\_path, betas } params, RequestOptionsoptions?): [BetaManagedAgentsFileResource](api/beta.md) { id, created\_at, file\_id, 3 more }

##### [List Session Resources](api/beta/sessions/resources/list.md)

##### [Get Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/retrieve.md)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources/{resource\_id}

##### [Update Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/update.md)

BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResource { memory\_store\_id, type, access, 4 more } о‚љ

A memory store attached to an agent session.

memory\_store\_id: stringо‚љ

The memory store ID (memstore\_...). Must belong to the caller's organization and workspace.

type: "memory\_store"о‚љ

оЂЄ

access?: "read\_write" | "read\_only" | nullо‚љ

Access mode for an attached memory store.

One of the following:

"read\_write"о‚љ

"read\_only"о‚љ

description?: stringо‚љ

Description of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Rendered into the agent's system prompt. Empty string when the store has no description.

instructions?: string | nullо‚љ

Per-attachment guidance for the agent on how to use this store. Rendered into the memory section of the system prompt. Max 4096 chars.

mount\_path?: string | nullо‚љ

Filesystem path where the store is mounted in the session container, e.g. /mnt/memory/user-preferences. Derived from the store's name. Output-only.

name?: string | nullо‚љ

Display name of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Later edits to the store's name do not propagate to this resource.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResource { memory\_store\_id, type, access, 4 more } о‚љ

A memory store attached to an agent session.

memory\_store\_id: stringо‚љ

The memory store ID (memstore\_...). Must belong to the caller's organization and workspace.

type: "memory\_store"о‚љ

оЂЄ

access?: "read\_write" | "read\_only" | nullо‚љ

Access mode for an attached memory store.

One of the following:

"read\_write"о‚љ

"read\_only"о‚љ

description?: stringо‚љ

Description of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Rendered into the agent's system prompt. Empty string when the store has no description.

instructions?: string | nullо‚љ

Per-attachment guidance for the agent on how to use this store. Rendered into the memory section of the system prompt. Max 4096 chars.

mount\_path?: string | nullо‚љ

Filesystem path where the store is mounted in the session container, e.g. /mnt/memory/user-preferences. Derived from the store's name. Output-only.

name?: string | nullо‚љ

Display name of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Later edits to the store's name do not propagate to this resource.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent { id, input, name, 3 more } о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

Unique identifier for this event.

input: Record<string, unknown>о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: stringо‚љ

session\_thread\_id?: string | nullо‚љ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent { id, error, processed\_at, type } о‚љ

An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

error: [BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsModelOverloadedError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsModelRateLimitedError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  | 5 moreо‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError { message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

One of the following:

BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn { type } о‚љ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction { event\_ids, type } о‚љ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: Array<string>о‚љ

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: "requires\_action"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted { type } о‚љ

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

Emitted when a subagent is spawned as a new thread. Written to the parent thread's output stream so clients observing the session see child creation.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the callable agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringо‚љ

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

type: "session.thread\_created"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent { id, explanation, iteration, 6 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вЂ” no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: stringо‚љ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: stringо‚љ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вЂ” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"о‚љ

оЂЄ

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

speed?: "standard" | "fast" | nullо‚љ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"о‚љ

"fast"о‚љ

One of the following:

"standard"о‚љ

"fast"о‚љ

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

type: "span.model\_request\_end"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_ongoing"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent { id, description, max\_iterations, 4 more } о‚љ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

description: stringо‚љ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: number | nullо‚љ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsAgentArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

The deployment's agent was archived.

type: "agent\_archived\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsCronSchedule { expression, timezone, type, 2 more } о‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule with computed runtime timestamps.

expression: stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: stringо‚љ

IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC").

type: "cron"о‚љ

last\_run\_at?: string | nullо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

upcoming\_runs\_at?: Array<string>о‚љ

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsCronScheduleParams { expression, timezone, type } о‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule. Literal wall-clock matching in the configured timezone.

expression: stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: stringо‚љ

Required. IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC"). Validated against the IANA timezone database.

type: "cron"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsDeployment { id, agent, archived\_at, 13 more } о‚љ

A deployment is a configured instance of an agent вЂ” it binds the agent to everything needed to run it autonomously: an environment, credentials, initial events, and an optional schedule.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this deployment.

оЂЄ

agent: [BetaManagedAgentsAgentReference](api/beta.md) { id, type, version } о‚љ

A resolved agent reference with a concrete version.

id: stringо‚љ

type: "agent"о‚љ

version: numberо‚љ

archived\_at: string | nullо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

created\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

description: string | nullо‚љ

Description of what the deployment does.

environment\_id: stringо‚љ

ID of the `environment` where sessions run.

оЂЄ

initial\_events: Array<[BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentInitialEvent](api/beta.md)>о‚љ

Evalв†’revision cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentSystemMessageEvent { content, type } о‚љ

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt.

оЂЄ

content: Array<[BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md) { text, type } >о‚љ

System content blocks to append. Text-only.

text: stringо‚љ

The text content.

type: "text"о‚љ

type: "system.message"о‚љ

metadata: Record<string, string>о‚љ

Arbitrary key-value metadata. Maximum 16 pairs.

name: stringо‚љ

Human-readable name.

оЂЄ

paused\_reason: [BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentPausedReason](api/beta.md) | nullо‚љ

Why a deployment is paused. Non-null exactly when `status` is `paused`.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsManualDeploymentPausedReason { type } о‚љ

The caller invoked the pause endpoint on the deployment.

type: "manual"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsErrorDeploymentPausedReason { error, type } о‚љ

A scheduled fire recorded a failed run whose error auto-pauses the deployment.

оЂЄ

error: [BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentPausedReasonError](api/beta.md)о‚љ

The error that triggered an auto-pause. Matches the failed run's `error.type`.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsEnvironmentArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

The deployment's environment was archived.

type: "environment\_archived\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsAgentArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

The deployment's agent was archived.

type: "agent\_archived\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsEnvironmentNotFoundDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

The deployment's environment no longer exists.

type: "environment\_not\_found\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsVaultNotFoundDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

A vault referenced by the deployment no longer exists.

type: "vault\_not\_found\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsFileNotFoundDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

A file resource referenced by the deployment no longer exists.

type: "file\_not\_found\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionResourceNotFoundDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

A referenced resource no longer exists and its kind was not reported.

type: "session\_resource\_not\_found\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsWorkspaceArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

The deployment's workspace was archived.

type: "workspace\_archived\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsOrganizationDisabledDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

The deployment's organization is disabled.

type: "organization\_disabled\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

A memory store referenced by the deployment is archived.

type: "memory\_store\_archived\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSkillNotFoundDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

A skill referenced by the deployment's agent no longer exists.

type: "skill\_not\_found\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsVaultArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

A vault referenced by the deployment is archived.

type: "vault\_archived\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUnknownDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

An unrecognized error auto-paused the deployment. A fallback variant; matches a run whose `error.type` is `unknown_error`.

type: "unknown\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSelfHostedResourcesUnsupportedDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

The deployment configures resources, but its environment is self-hosted and cannot mount them.

type: "self\_hosted\_resources\_unsupported\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsMCPEgressBlockedDeploymentPausedReasonError { type } о‚љ

An MCP server host used by the deployment's agent is blocked by the environment's network policy.

type: "mcp\_egress\_blocked\_error"о‚љ

type: "error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

resources: Array<[BetaManagedAgentsSessionResourceConfig](api/beta.md)>о‚љ

Resources attached to sessions created from this deployment. Echoes the input minus write-only credentials.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsGitHubRepositoryResourceConfig { type, url, checkout, mount\_path } о‚љ

A GitHub repository mounted into each session's container. The authorization token is write-only and never returned.

type: "github\_repository"о‚љ

url: stringо‚љ

Github URL of the repository

оЂЄ

checkout?: [BetaManagedAgentsBranchCheckout](api/beta.md) { name, type }  | [BetaManagedAgentsCommitCheckout](api/beta.md) { sha, type }  | nullо‚љ

Branch or commit to check out. Defaults to the repository's default branch.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsBranchCheckout { name, type } о‚љ

name: stringо‚љ

Branch name to check out.

type: "branch"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsCommitCheckout { sha, type } о‚љ

sha: stringо‚љ

Full commit SHA to check out.

type: "commit"о‚љ

mount\_path?: string | nullо‚љ

Mount path in the container. Defaults to `/workspace/<repo-name>`.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsFileResourceConfig { file\_id, type, mount\_path } о‚љ

A file mounted into each session's container.

file\_id: stringо‚љ

ID of a previously uploaded file.

type: "file"о‚љ

mount\_path?: string | nullо‚љ

Mount path in the container. Defaults to `/mnt/session/uploads/<file_id>`.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceConfig { memory\_store\_id, type, access, instructions } о‚љ

A memory store attached to each session created from this deployment.

memory\_store\_id: stringо‚љ

The memory store ID (memstore\_...). Must belong to the caller's organization and workspace.

type: "memory\_store"о‚љ

оЂЄ

access?: "read\_write" | "read\_only" | nullо‚љ

Access mode for an attached memory store.

One of the following:

"read\_write"о‚љ

"read\_only"о‚љ

instructions?: string | nullо‚љ

Per-attachment guidance for the agent on how to use this store. Rendered into the memory section of the system prompt. Max 4096 chars.

оЂЄ

schedule: [BetaManagedAgentsSchedule](api/beta.md) { expression, timezone, type, 2 more }  | nullо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule with computed runtime timestamps.

expression: stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: stringо‚љ

IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC").

type: "cron"о‚љ

last\_run\_at?: string | nullо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

upcoming\_runs\_at?: Array<string>о‚љ

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

оЂЄ

status: [BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentStatus](api/beta.md)о‚љ

Lifecycle status of a deployment.

One of the following:

"active"о‚љ

"paused"о‚љ

type: "deployment"о‚љ

updated\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

vault\_ids: Array<string>о‚љ

Vault IDs supplying stored credentials for sessions created from this deployment.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParams { content, type } о‚љ

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

оЂЄ

Why a deployment is paused. Non-null exactly when `status` is `paused`.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsManualDeploymentPausedReason { type } о‚љ

The caller invoked the pause endpoint on the deployment.

type: "manual"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsErrorDeploymentPausedReason { error, type } о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSchedule { expression, timezone, type, 2 more } о‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule with computed runtime timestamps.

expression: stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: stringо‚љ

IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC").

type: "cron"о‚љ

last\_run\_at?: string | nullо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

upcoming\_runs\_at?: Array<string>о‚љ

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsScheduleParams { expression, timezone, type } о‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule. Literal wall-clock matching in the configured timezone.

expression: stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: stringо‚љ

Required. IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC"). Validated against the IANA timezone database.

type: "cron"о‚љ

оЂЄ

The deployment configures resources, but its environment is self-hosted and cannot mount them.

type: "self\_hosted\_resources\_unsupported\_error"о‚љ
